data.name: Error_Unauthorized
data.value: Authentication failed. Verify your Polar access token.

data.name: Error_Forbidden
data.value: Access denied. Your token does not have permission for this operation.

data.name: Error_NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: Error_RateLimit
data.value: Rate limit exceeded. Retry after {0} seconds.

data.name: Error_ServerError
data.value: A Polar server error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: Error_Timeout
data.value: The request to Polar timed out.

data.name: Error_NetworkFailure
data.value: A network error occurred while connecting to Polar.

data.name: Webhook_TimestampExpired
data.value: Webhook timestamp is outside the acceptable tolerance window.

data.name: Tenant_NotResolved
data.value: Could not determine the current tenant from the request context.

data.name: Tenant_NotConfigured
data.value: No Polar configuration found for tenant '{0}'.

data.name: Tenant_NoActiveContext
data.value: No active multi-tenant context is available.
